title: Portfolio Website Template
shortDescription: Animated personal portfolio with dark theme, showcase, and admin dashboard.
longDescription: A modern, animated portfolio website built with Next.js 15, Framer Motion, and Tailwind CSS v4. Features cinematic entrance animations, dark celestial theme, about page with skill bars and experience timeline, project showcase with detail modals, integrated shop for selling templates, full admin dashboard with analytics, and proxy layer for third-party integrations. SEO optimized, fully responsive, and production-ready.
features: Cinematic entrance animation with letter-by-letter reveal
About page with grouped skill bars and timeline
Project showcase grid with animated modals
API proxy layer for external services

title: SaaS Admin Dashboard
shortDescription: Full-featured admin panel with analytics, user management, and RBAC.
longDescription: A production-ready SaaS admin dashboard built with Next.js 15, TypeScript, and Recharts. Features real-time analytics with interactive charts, user management with role-based access control (RBAC), data tables with sorting/filtering/pagination, product and order management, dark mode, and fully responsive design. Backed by PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM and Redis for session caching.
features: Data tables with sort, filter, and pagination

title: E-Commerce Management Suite
shortDescription: Complete e-commerce with dynamic products, orders, payments, and analytics.
longDescription: A comprehensive full-stack e-commerce platform built with Next.js 15 and Prisma. Features a dynamic product catalog with category-based custom attributes (JSONB), complete order lifecycle management (pending → paid → delivered), PromptPay QR payment integration, Stripe support, usage analytics tracking, shop funnel metrics, and a full admin dashboard. Built with PostgreSQL and Redis, ready for production deployment on Vercel.
features: Dynamic product catalog with custom JSONB metadata per category
LINE Notify order alerts for admin
Admin dashboard with charts and export

title: Insurance & Fintech Platform API
shortDescription: Enterprise insurance workflow engine with .NET Core microservices and React admin.
longDescription: An enterprise-grade insurance platform API built with .NET Core microservices architecture. Includes a high-concurrency workflow engine for financial transaction lifecycle management, real-time third-party API integrations (insurance providers), policy management with document generation, granular access control (whitelist system), admin monitoring dashboard with real-time metrics, and React frontend. Architected for high availability with Docker containerization.
features: High-concurrency workflow engine for transaction management

title: SaaS Starter Boilerplate
shortDescription: Production-ready SaaS boilerplate with auth, billing, teams, and admin.
longDescription: A comprehensive SaaS starter template built with Next.js 15. Includes NextAuth v5 authentication (Google, GitHub, credentials), Stripe subscription billing with multiple tiers, team management with invitations, role-based access control, usage limits per plan, admin panel, email notifications, and analytics. Database with Prisma + PostgreSQL and Redis caching. Ready to deploy on Vercel in minutes.
features: NextAuth v5 with Google, GitHub, and email/password
Admin panel for managing users and subscriptions

title: HR & Resource Management System
shortDescription: Complete HR system with employee management, attendance, payroll, and reporting.
longDescription: A comprehensive HR management system built with .NET Core backend and React frontend. Features employee profile management, attendance tracking with QR code check-in, leave request workflow with approval chain, payroll calculation and slip generation, performance review system, organizational chart, and HR analytics dashboard. Built with PostgreSQL and follows clean architecture principles.
features: Leave request with multi-level approval workflow

title: Enterprise WMS (Warehouse Management System)
shortDescription: Complete warehouse management with inventory, inbound/outbound, picking, packing, and bilingual TH/EN.
longDescription: A comprehensive enterprise-grade Warehouse Management System built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Features 28+ pages covering the complete warehouse workflow: inbound receiving with supplier management, putaway task automation, real-time inventory tracking across warehouses/zones/bins, space & zone management with occupancy visualization, pick list generation, packing with box management, stock counting with variance detection, returns processing, and full user/role management with audit logging. Includes a modern indigo enterprise UI theme, bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant language switching, real-time dashboard with KPI cards and analytics charts, advanced data tables, and role-based access control.
features: Inbound order receiving with supplier management
Putaway task automation with bin assignment
Space & zone management with occupancy visualization
Packing with box management and item tracking
Real-time dashboard with KPI cards and charts

title: POS (Point of Sale) System
shortDescription: Complete retail POS with cart, payments, inventory, reports, and bilingual TH/EN.
longDescription: A comprehensive Point of Sale system built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Features a full-width POS terminal with product grid, barcode scanning, cart management with hold/resume, and multiple payment methods (Cash with numpad, Card, PromptPay, Transfer). Includes product & variant management, category organization, customer loyalty tracking, inventory management with stock adjustments, sales analytics with interactive charts, end-of-day cash reconciliation, user management with role-based access (Admin/Manager/Cashier), and complete store settings. Built with an emerald/teal enterprise theme and bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant switching.
features: Full-width POS terminal with product grid and cart panel
Barcode scanner support with rapid keystroke detection
Multiple payment methods: Cash (numpad), Card, PromptPay, Transfer
Cart hold/resume for serving multiple customers
Customer loyalty tracking with purchase history
End-of-day cash reconciliation and daily close

title: Enterprise CRM (Customer Relationship Management)
shortDescription: Complete CRM with contacts, companies, deals pipeline, activities, and bilingual TH/EN.
longDescription: A comprehensive Customer Relationship Management system built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Features contact and company management with detailed profiles and interaction history, deals pipeline with customizable kanban board stages, activity tracking (calls, emails, meetings, tasks), sales dashboard with KPI cards and analytics charts, pipeline reports with conversion metrics, team performance tracking, and full user/role management with audit logging. Includes bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant language switching, tags and advanced filtering, data export capabilities, customizable pipeline stages, and role-based access control (Admin/Manager/Sales Rep). Built with an amber/orange enterprise theme, real-time statistics, and responsive design.
features: Contact management with detailed profiles and interaction history
Company management with hierarchy and associated contacts
Deals pipeline with drag-and-drop kanban board
Activity tracking: calls, emails, meetings, and tasks
Sales dashboard with KPI cards and analytics charts
Pipeline reports with conversion metrics and forecasting
Fully responsive design for desktop and mobile
Audit logging for all CRM operations
Tags and advanced filtering across all entities
Customizable pipeline stages and deal fields
Real-time statistics and live dashboard updates
